name: Cactus Chicken Fried Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow dish, mix the chicken base with garlic salt and celery salt.
2. In another shallow dish, beat the eggs with water.
3. In a third shallow dish, combine the flour with jalapeno powder and new mexico chile powder; season to taste with additional salt and pepper if desired.
4. Dip each steak first into the seasoned flour mixture, then into the egg wash, and finally back into the seasoned flour mixture, coating evenly on all sides.
5. Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet until it reaches about 350°F (175°C) or is ready for frying.
6. Carefully lower coated steaks into the hot oil and fry until golden brown, approximately 3-4 minutes per side.
7. Using tongs, remove fried steaks from the oil and place them on paper towels to drain excess oil.
8. In the same skillet, reserve about 2 tablespoons of the cooking oil along with any rendered fat.
9. Reduce heat to medium-low, add milk and chicken bouillon (or instant chicken bouillon), stirring constantly until a sauce forms.
10. Once the sauce thickens, adjust seasoning if necessary, then serve over the fried steaks.
